description: Apply i18n translations to ALL page components. Replace every hardcoded Korean string in every page with t() calls, and add corresponding keys to both ko.json and en.json locale files. This covers all ~30 page components across Solutions, R&D, Products, Cases, About, Login, Customer Service, Government Support, NotFound, and Sitemap sections.
steps: 1. Update grape/src/pages/Home/Home.jsx - translate card eyebrow, title, description, ctaText, caption. Translate hero section card titles ('Smart AI Camera', announcement fallback text, case card title). Use t() for all strings.

2. Update grape/src/pages/Solutions/Soulution.jsx - translate BREADCRUMBS, TECH_STACK (title, subtitle, desc for each), DOMAINS (title, subtitle, items arrays), PIPELINE (step, title, subtitle, items). All page section headers and descriptions.
3. Update grape/src/pages/Solutions/ChemicalSolution.jsx - translate all breadcrumbs, section titles, descriptions, list items.
4. Update grape/src/pages/Solutions/ManufacturingSolution.jsx - translate all breadcrumbs, section titles, descriptions, list items.

5. Update grape/src/pages/rnd/MultimodalAwareness.jsx - translate breadcrumbs, title, subtitle, MULTIMODAL_CARDS subtitle and description paragraphs, all section headers (overview, core tech table headers/cells, etc).
6. Update grape/src/pages/rnd/RAGLLMTech.jsx - translate all content.
7. Update grape/src/pages/rnd/OnDeviceAI.jsx - translate all content.
8. Update grape/src/pages/rnd/Embeddedsystem .jsx - translate all content.
9. Update grape/src/pages/rnd/SmartAssistiveTechnology.jsx - translate all content.
10. Update grape/src/pages/rnd/AirQualityManagement.jsx - translate all content.

11. Update grape/src/pages/Products/Product_list_safety.jsx, Product_detail_safety.jsx, Product_list_control.jsx, Product_control.jsx, Product_list_monitoring.jsx - translate product names, descriptions, breadcrumbs, filter labels, tab labels.

12. Update grape/src/pages/Cases/Case.jsx, Case_SmartSafety.jsx, Case_IntegratedControl.jsx, Case_InformationCommunication.jsx, Case_detail.jsx - translate case titles, descriptions, orderer info, type labels, breadcrumbs.

13. Update grape/src/pages/About/About.jsx, CompanyIntro.jsx, History.jsx, Organization.jsx, Licenses.jsx, Directions.jsx - translate company intro, CEO greeting, mission/vision/core values, history timeline, organization chart labels, license names, directions info.
14. Update grape/src/pages/Login/Login.jsx, ForgotPassword.jsx - translate form labels, buttons, error messages, breadcrumbs.
15. Update grape/src/pages/Customer_Service/Announcement.jsx - translate breadcrumbs, titles, table headers, buttons.
16. Update grape/src/pages/Government_support/Government_support.jsx - translate all content.
17. Update grape/src/pages/NotFound/NotFound.jsx - translate 404 message.
18. Update grape/src/pages/Sitemap/sitemap.jsx - translate sitemap labels.
19. Update grape/src/components/Breadcrumbs/Breadcrumbs.jsx if it hardcodes any text (like 'Home').
20. Update grape/src/components/CardRotator/index.jsx if it contains hardcoded text.

21. Add all new translation keys to grape/src/locales/ko.json and grape/src/locales/en.json. English translations must use professional business English appropriate for AI safety, industrial safety, smart safety management, integrated control, and AIBox domains.
22. Run vite build to confirm no compilation errors.
acceptance_criteria: Every page component uses t() for all user-visible Korean text
ko.json contains all Korean text organized by page/section
en.json contains professional English translations for all keys
No hardcoded Korean strings remain in JSX (except maybe alt text for decorative images)
The translation keys are organized logically (home.*, solutions.*, rnd.*, products.*, cases.*, about.*, login.*, etc.)
verification: Run: grep -r '"[\uAC00-\uD7AF]' grape/src/pages/ --include='*.jsx' | head -20 to check for remaining hardcoded Korean (some dynamic content from API is acceptable)
findings: Build succeeds. All 30+ page components now use useTranslation hook. Locale files expanded with solutions (3 sub-sections with full techStack/domains/pipeline arrays), rnd (6 pages - breadcrumbs/title/subtitle), products (3 pages), cases (3 category pages), about (6 pages), login, forgotPassword, announcement, governmentSupport, notFound, sitemap sections. The Solutions pages use the full data-driven approach where arrays (techStack, domains, pipeline) are stored in locale files. R&D pages keep detailed technical content in the component (since it has complex HTML structure with tables, lists, subsections) but breadcrumbs/title/subtitle are translated. Cases pages keep factual delivery records in the component but use t() for UI chrome. Home page cards come entirely from locale files. All Link paths updated with /${currentLang}/ prefix.
